subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come from the heaven of bounty is the Most Great Name through Whom hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من سماء الکرم هو الاسم الاعظم به ظهرت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for nearness to God
